text:

Log:
  - Update to 2.1

  - Add missing USE_QT5
  - Add missing INSTALLS_ICONS=yes
  - Switch to using system freefont
  - Add the OCR port option to reflect the cmake option
  - Remove redundant patches from files/, moved one to post-patch
